pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and official OpenToonz sample repository (https://github.com/opentoonz/opentoonz_sample/)
task.json description requires blur radius to be at least 5
verifier.py uses BLUR_THRESHOLD = 400 for full points and SHARP_THRESHOLD = 800 for partial points
export_result.sh checks for avg_intensity < 1.0 to determine if an image is blank

privileged_info_summary: The task requires applying a blur effect to the official OpenToonz sample scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' and rendering at least 20 frames to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blur_fx. A minimum blur radius of 5 is instructed. Verification relies on rendered images having an average intensity >= 1.0 to not be considered blank, and a Laplacian variance < 400 for full points (or < 800 for partial points). This contradicts the metadata claims of a 'max_sharpness_score' of 500 and a 'min_content_score' of 10.
